title: Return Policy 2024
description: Describes rules for returning items, 14-day right of withdrawal, and complaint rights. Covers return shipping costs and exceptions.

title: Delivery Terms 2024
description: Describes delivery times, shipping prices, delivery methods, and geographic coverage. Standard 2-4 days, express 1-2 days.

title: Product Warranty 2024
description: Warranty conditions for electronics (2 years) and accessories (1 year). Covers what is and is not included in the warranty.

title: Privacy Policy 2024
description: GDPR-compliant privacy policy. Describes what data is collected, why, how long it is stored, and customer rights.

title: Internal HR Policy 2024
description: Internal HR policy covering employment conditions, working hours, holiday, sick leave, salary, and benefits. Confidential.
